flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Maine Community College fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (34.7% → 28.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Maine Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Maine Community College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.8k).
